description:
A base map displaying the geographical coverage of the European continent and its Outermost Regions, segmented into internal administrative divisions. The main map shows Europe, extending from Iceland and Ireland in the west, through Scandinavia in the north, and including countries in Eastern Europe and Turkey in the southeast. All land areas are uniformly shaded grey with black outlines indicating national and sub-national administrative boundaries.
Several inset maps are included for Outermost Regions:
*   GP (Guadeloupe)
*   MQ (Martinique)
*   YT (Mayotte)
*   RE (Réunion)
*   GF (French Guiana), which itself displays internal administrative divisions.
Additionally, several unlabelled small island territories are depicted in the lower-left corner of the map frame.
The main map includes a scale bar with markers at 0 km, 400 km, 800 km, and 1200 km. The inset map for French Guiana (GF) also contains a scale bar marked at 0 km, 200 km, 400 km, and 600 km. No specific data or thematic information is conveyed through colour or shading, beyond the demarcation of land and administrative boundaries.
